name: Saskatoon Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Saskatoon berries (also called Serviceberries in the US)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, simmer the saskatoon berries with water over low heat for 10 minutes.
2. Add lemon juice. Stir together granulated sugar and flour until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a pastry-lined pie plate.
4. Dot the top with butter.
5. Cover with the top crust of the pie; seal, flute, and trim the edges.
6. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 35-45 minutes, or until golden brown.
